Governing 100+ agents?

Enterprise plans include volume discounts, custom SLAs, and dedicated support. Let's build a plan that fits your fleet.

Talk to Sales

Frequently Asked Questions

What counts as an agent?

An agent is any autonomous AI system that submits intents to Vienna OS. If you have 3 LangChain agents and 2 OpenClaw agents, that's 5 agents. Read-only monitoring doesn't count.

Can I start free and upgrade?

Yes. The Community tier is fully functional open-source software. When you're ready for cloud hosting, SSO, or compliance features, upgrade to Team or Business.

Is there a free trial?

Team and Business tiers include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required to start.

What's the difference between self-hosted and cloud?

Community is self-hosted — you run Vienna OS on your own infrastructure. Team and Business are cloud-hosted at regulator.ai with managed updates, backups, and support.

Do you offer annual pricing?

Yes. Annual plans save 20%. Contact us for details.

What frameworks do you support?

Vienna OS is framework-agnostic. We have official SDKs for OpenClaw, LangChain, CrewAI, and AutoGen. Any framework can integrate via our REST API.

Ready to govern your AI agents?

Join teams already using Vienna OS to secure their agent deployments.
